# Signatories

## Project team

| Name | Role | Affiliation |
|---|---|---|
| Arkadiusz Gladki | Author, maintainer | Independent / [gladki.pl](https://gladki.pl) |

I am the current maintainer of both `igvShiny` and `igvR` on Bioconductor, and an R/Shiny developer with a commercial track record ([gladki.pl](https://gladki.pl), [github.com/gladkia](https://github.com/gladkia)). I took over `igvShiny` from Paul Shannon, whose foundational architecture the package still relies on.

## Consulted

The open GitHub issues ([github.com/gladkia/igvShiny/issues](https://github.com/gladkia/igvShiny/issues)) represent direct input from bioinformaticians, clinicians, and Shiny developers. These shaped what I'm fixing in Milestones 1 and 2.
